hook.text: UNITED AHEAD OF LIVERPOOL IN TCHOUAMENI RACE

beats.text: UNITED HAVE HELD TALKS AND ARE QUIETLY OPTIMISTIC
MADRID WANT £84M TO SELL THE FRANCE INTERNATIONAL
UNITED SAY HE IS THEIR DREAM MIDFIELD TARGET

caption: United are edging ahead in the Tchouaméni race 🔴 Manchester United have held formal talks with Real Madrid over Aurélien Tchouaméni and sources say the Red Devils are closer to landing the France international than Liverpool. INEOS regard him as their 'dream midfield target' to anchor Carrick's engine room alongside Ederson Silva. Real Madrid are holding firm at £84m — but United are quietly optimistic a deal can be done. Liverpool remain in the race but United are in the driving seat. Can United pull this off? 👇 REPORTED — per Football365. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow
